description:
## Step 1 — Configure Wallet Settings

This is the control panel for the entire wallet flow. Open it and set:

- **Default Company** and **Default Currency**
- **Auto-create Wallet on Customer** (recommended: keep ON)
- **Top-up Approval Threshold** — top-ups at or above this amount need a manager's approval
- **Hold Expiry (hours)** — how long a Sales Order hold lives before auto-release (default 24h)

You'll come back to add the four GL accounts in the next step.
name: Configure Wallet Settings
title: Configure Wallet Settings
